title: d-c-fix window film privacy Frost – 45cm x 1,5m – static vinyl films for glass windows with a modern frosted pattern – self-adhesive, opaque, decorative for bathroom, home & kitchen
features: CREATIVE TRANSFORMATION of your glass surfaces: Our self-adhesive window film instantly enhances windows, glass doors, and shower enclosures. Stylish window tint design meets effective privacy protection
PRIVACY & UV PROTECTION: Our frosted pattern adhesive film offers reliable privacy without blocking daylight. Perfect for living rooms, offices, & bathrooms

FLEXIBLE APPLICATION – not just for windows: Our privacy films are also suitable for glass walls, shower enclosures, and conservatories. Beautiful interior design – window covers can be removed without leaving any residue
EASY TO CLEAN: To keep your frosted glass film looking fresh, just give it a quick wipe with warm water and a bit of washing-up liquid. Even stubborn marks don't stand a chance
UV WINDOW FILM - made in Germany: Sticks without any glue – just cling it on! Easy to remove and reuse, even months later
description: Product Description d-c-fix window films d-c-fix window & glass films Attractive window decoration meets elegant privacy protection - this is exactly what the window films from d-c-fix combine in a perfect way. Whether frosted glass look, abstract patterns or motifs corresponding to the seasons, there is a suitable design for every taste. The window films from d-c-fix come in different designs: Self Adhesive, Static & Static Premium. In addition, functional films are also part of the d-c-fix range. Self-adhesive window films The application of the self-adhesive films is particularly easy, because neither special tools nor special materials such as Glue required. The film only needs to be cut according to the surface to be glued, then remove the backing paper, spray with a little water and then position the material on the window. With a squeegee, the film can be painted and thus the formation of air bubbles can be avoided. The glass films are available in numerous different structures such as pearl or ice pattern, a frosted glass look, as well as designs that range from flower meadows to ornamental patterns. Static window films - static self-adhesive To attach the static adhesive window film, as well as the self-adhesive films, no tools or special glue are required. For processing, the glass surface is simply sprayed with a little water and the film is then placed on it. With a squeegee, water and air can be spread out. Just as easy as the installation is the removal. The film can even be reused several times. The films are available in a variety of different designs that protect not only from prying eyes, but also from UV radiation. Static premium window films - static self-adhesive The glass films from the Static Premium collection are just as easy to apply, remove and recycle as the static adhesive films and also protect against UV radiation. However, the films in this premium collection are slightly thicker and are therefore even easier to work with. Attractive and effective embossing with real glass character also underline an elegant look. Functional films The focus is not always on visual enhancement of window surfaces or privacy protection, sometimes the focus is on functional aspects such as UV or heat protection. Here the functional films from d-c-fix are an attractive solution. Whether heat, glare or privacy protection: the static or self-adhesive functional films improve the indoor climate and thus contribute to a feel-good atmosphere. The d-c-fix shatter protection film protects against injuries in case of glass breakage. The advantages of the d-c-fix window films: Quick and easy to use An absolute plus point of the D-C-fix window films is their quick and easy application. No special know-how or special tools are required for installation. Only a little water is needed for easier positioning. Privacy screen and window decoration in one Effective privacy and attractive designs? The window films from d-c-fix can do both, because no matter whether frosted glass effect or tendril pattern - curious eyes are elegantly repelled. Easy to clean Do you want the glass films to stay beautiful for as long as possible? No problem. They are very easy to clean. The films can be wiped clean with warm water and a little detergent or other commercially available non-abrasive detergents. Many more stubborn dirt can also be removed with alcohol-based detergents.
